title: SENKA FULL RANGE Perfect Whip Facial Cleanser
detail_text: Senka Perfect Whip Facial Foam Net 100g/120g Newest Expired Date Product of Japan Senka Perfect Whip Blue ♡ White Cocoon Essence creates a soft foam shg can keep the skin natural moisture face ♡ Cleanses impurities down to the pores of the face, and protects delicate skin Senka White Clay ♡ Cleanses deeper until pores ♡ Radiates Suppin Look charm (natural beautiful skin without makeup) ♡ White Clay that removes dead skin cells & brightens face without making dry Senka Acne Care ♡ Contains Kyoto chamomile extract and salicylic acid ♡ Reduce acne in four weeks Senka Vibrant White ♡ Fuji Sakura Essence & Licorice that effectively controls melanin production on skin, fades dark spots & brightens facial skin ♡ Facial skin looks prettier and brighter blush ♡ Contains White Cocoon Essence & Double Hyaluronic Acid ♡ With a fresh floral scent Senka Fresh ♡ U skin combination-oily skin ♡ Cleaning dust as well as pore-clogging pollution & control excess sebum on the face ♡ Contains White Cocoon Essence & Double Hyaluronic Acid Senka Berry Bright ♡ Moisture Boost Technology - > improve skin suppleness & nourish ♡ Yoshino Cherry Blossom, Raspberry, Cranberry - > antioxidants, brighten dull skin, nourish tired skin Senka Vit C Poreless Glow ♡ With Japanes yuzu extract – able to nourish skin with Vitamin C, become healthier and glowing. Contains Senka secret with ♡ Double Hyalurnic Acid and White Cocoon Essence capable of moisturizing skin and nourishing skin Instructions - Wet hand and take a pearl-sized amount of cleanser. - Lather up the cleanser with hands or with the help of a net or sponge adding some drops of water as needed. - When the foam is ready, massage gently onto face, cleanse and finally rinse thoroughly with water.
detail_html:
Senka Perfect Whip Facial Foam

Net 100g/120g

Newest Expired Date

Product of Japan

Senka Perfect Whip Blue

♡ White Cocoon Essence creates a soft foam shg can keep the skin natural moisture face

♡ Cleanses impurities down to the pores of the face, and protects delicate skin

Senka White Clay

♡ Cleanses deeper until pores

♡ Radiates Suppin Look charm (natural beautiful skin without makeup)

♡ White Clay that removes dead skin cells & brightens face without making dry

Senka Acne Care

♡ Contains Kyoto chamomile extract and salicylic acid

♡ Reduce acne in four weeks

Senka Vibrant White

♡ Fuji Sakura Essence & Licorice that effectively controls melanin production on skin, fades dark spots & brightens facial skin

♡ Facial skin looks prettier and brighter blush

♡ Contains White Cocoon Essence & Double Hyaluronic Acid

♡ With a fresh floral scent

Senka Fresh

♡ U skin combination-oily skin

♡ Cleaning dust as well as pore-clogging pollution & control excess sebum on the face

♡ Contains White Cocoon Essence & Double Hyaluronic Acid

Senka Berry Bright

♡ Moisture Boost Technology - > improve skin suppleness & nourish

♡ Yoshino Cherry Blossom, Raspberry, Cranberry - > antioxidants, brighten dull skin, nourish tired skin

Senka Vit C Poreless Glow

♡ With Japanes yuzu extract – able to nourish skin with Vitamin C, become healthier and glowing. Contains Senka secret with ♡ Double Hyalurnic Acid and White Cocoon Essence capable of moisturizing skin and nourishing skin

Instructions

- Wet hand and take a pearl-sized amount of cleanser.

- Lather up the cleanser with hands or with the help of a net or sponge adding some drops of water as needed.

- When the foam is ready, massage gently onto face, cleanse and finally rinse thoroughly with water.

Contains Senka secret with ♡ Double Hyalurnic Acid and White Cocoon Essence capable of moisturizing skin and nourishing skin Instructions - Wet hand and take a pearl-sized amount of cleanser. - Lather up the cleanser with hands or with the help of a net or sponge adding some drops of water as needed. - When the foam is ready, massage gently onto face, cleanse and finally rinse thoroughly with water.

product.desc:
Senka Perfect Whip Facial Foam

Net 100g/120g

Newest Expired Date

Product of Japan

Senka Perfect Whip Blue

♡ White Cocoon Essence creates a soft foam shg can keep the skin natural moisture face

♡ Cleanses impurities down to the pores of the face, and protects delicate skin

Senka White Clay

♡ Cleanses deeper until pores

♡ Radiates Suppin Look charm (natural beautiful skin without makeup)

♡ White Clay that removes dead skin cells & brightens face without making dry

Senka Acne Care

♡ Contains Kyoto chamomile extract and salicylic acid

♡ Reduce acne in four weeks

Senka Vibrant White

♡ Fuji Sakura Essence & Licorice that effectively controls melanin production on skin, fades dark spots & brightens facial skin

♡ Facial skin looks prettier and brighter blush

♡ Contains White Cocoon Essence & Double Hyaluronic Acid

♡ With a fresh floral scent

Senka Fresh

♡ U skin combination-oily skin

♡ Cleaning dust as well as pore-clogging pollution & control excess sebum on the face

♡ Contains White Cocoon Essence & Double Hyaluronic Acid

Senka Berry Bright

♡ Moisture Boost Technology - > improve skin suppleness & nourish

♡ Yoshino Cherry Blossom, Raspberry, Cranberry - > antioxidants, brighten dull skin, nourish tired skin

Senka Vit C Poreless Glow

♡ With Japanes yuzu extract – able to nourish skin with Vitamin C, become healthier and glowing. Contains Senka secret with ♡ Double Hyalurnic Acid and White Cocoon Essence capable of moisturizing skin and nourishing skin

Instructions

- Wet hand and take a pearl-sized amount of cleanser.

- Lather up the cleanser with hands or with the help of a net or sponge adding some drops of water as needed.

- When the foam is ready, massage gently onto face, cleanse and finally rinse thoroughly with water.
product.highlights:
📌 Perfect Whip Blue, COllagen, White Clay all are in 120g 

📌 The rest of the variant is in 100g.

page_json.name: SENKA FULL RANGE Perfect Whip Facial Cleanser
page_json.description: SENKA Perfect Whip Facial Cleanser offers pore control and acne care for all skin types. Available in multiple fragrances-free variants, including Collagen, White Clay, and Vitamin C, in convenient 100g and 120g sizes for various skincare needs. - Lazada

title: [Eskinol] Pimple Fighting Facial Deep Cleanser
detail_text: About This Product: This Eskinol for pimple marks removes deep-seated dirt, excess oil, and makeup with its Micro-Cleanse Anti-Bacterial Formula. It also dries up pimples with the Dermaclear Formulation containing Salicylic Acid and Tea Tree Extracts. With added Vitamin B3 and Chamomile Extract, it helps lighten acne scars and helps soothe redness. How To Use: Moisten a piece of cotton with this Eskinol pimple-fighting cleanser and apply it on your face and neck. Repeat until no trace of dirt is seen on the cotton. Use anytime and anywhere for truly clean skin.
detail_html:
About This Product:

This Eskinol for pimple marks removes deep-seated dirt, excess oil, and makeup with its Micro-Cleanse Anti-Bacterial Formula. It also dries up pimples with the Dermaclear Formulation containing Salicylic Acid and Tea Tree Extracts. With added Vitamin B3 and Chamomile Extract, it helps lighten acne scars and helps soothe redness.

How To Use:

  • Moisten a piece of cotton with this Eskinol pimple-fighting cleanser and apply it on your face and neck.
  • Repeat until no trace of dirt is seen on the cotton.
  • Use anytime and anywhere for truly clean skin.

detail_blocks.text: About This Product: This Eskinol for pimple marks removes deep-seated dirt, excess oil, and makeup with its Micro-Cleanse Anti-Bacterial Formula. It also dries up pimples with the Dermaclear Formulation containing Salicylic Acid and Tea Tree Extracts. With added Vitamin B3 and Chamomile Extract, it helps lighten acne scars and helps soothe redness. How To Use: Moisten a piece of cotton with this Eskinol pimple-fighting cleanser and apply it on your face and neck. Repeat until no trace of dirt is seen on the cotton. Use anytime and anywhere for truly clean skin.

With added Vitamin B3 and Chamomile Extract, it helps lighten acne scars and helps soothe redness.
